---
title: "Random survival forest models"
author: "Puck Quarles van Ufford"
date: today
format: html
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false
#| echo: true

library("tidyverse")
library("randomForestSRC")
library("caret")
library("survival")
```

```{r}
#| label: seed
#| echo: true

set.seed(8)
```

# Load data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| message: false
#| echo: true

data_os <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os.tsv")
data_os_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLP.tsv")
data_os_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_nogenomic.tsv")
data_os_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLPgenomic.tsv")

data_dfs <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLP.tsv")
data_dfs_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_nogenomic.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLPgenomic.tsv")
```

# Settings

```{r}
#| label: settings
#| echo: true

trees <- 1000

rule <- "logrankscore" # logrank (default), bs.gradient, or logrankscore

tree_grid <- c(1, seq(50, trees, by = 50))
```

# Set up cross-validation

```{r}
#| label: 5_fold_CV
#| echo: true

folds_os <- createFolds(data_os$os_status,
                        k = 5,
                        list = TRUE,
                        returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLP <- createFolds(data_os_noNLP$os_status,
                              k = 5,
                              list = TRUE,
                              returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_os_nogenomic$os_status,
                                  k = 5,
                                  list = TRUE,
                                  returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_os_noNLPgenomic$os_status,
                                     k = 5,
                                     list = TRUE,
                                     returnTrain = FALSE)

folds_dfs <- createFolds(data_dfs$dfs_status,
                         k = 5,
                         list = TRUE,
                         returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLP <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLP$dfs_status,
                               k = 5,
                               list = TRUE,
                               returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_nogenomic$dfs_status,
                                   k = 5,
                                   list = TRUE,
                                   returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLPgenomic$dfs_status,
                                      k = 5,
                                      list = TRUE,
                                      returnTrain = FALSE)
```

# Predicting OS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_os
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_os <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                      function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_os,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_os |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_os_event, 
                          os_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event, 
                         test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_os <- rsf_res_os |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_os |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: all") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_OS_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_os <- summary_os |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "OS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_os

write_tsv(final_os,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_os_noNLP <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                            function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_os_noNLP,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_os_noNLP |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_os_event, 
                          os_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event, 
                         test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_os_noNLP  <- rsf_res_os_noNLP  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_os_noNLP  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_OS_noNLP_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_os_noNLP  <- summary_os_noNLP  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "OS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_os_noNLP 

write_tsv(final_os_noNLP,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_os_nogenomic <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                                 function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_os_nogenomic,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_os_nogenomic |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_os_event, 
                          os_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event, 
                         test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_os_nogenomic  <- rsf_res_os_nogenomic  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_os_nogenomic  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no genomic") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_OS_nogenomic_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_os_nogenomic  <- summary_os_nogenomic  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "OS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_os_nogenomic 

write_tsv(final_os_nogenomic,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_os_noNLPgenomic <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                                    function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_os_noNLPgenomic,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_os_event, 
                          os_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event, 
                         test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_os_noNLPgenomic  <- rsf_res_os_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_os_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (OS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP or genomic") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_OS_noNLPgenomic_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_os_noNLPgenomic  <- summary_os_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "OS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_os_noNLPgenomic 

write_tsv(final_os_noNLPgenomic,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```
# Predicting DFS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_dfs <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                       function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_dfs,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_dfs |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_dfs_event, 
                          dfs_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event, 
                         test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_dfs <- rsf_res_dfs |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_dfs |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: all") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_DFS_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_dfs <- summary_dfs |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "DFS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_dfs

write_tsv(final_dfs,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_dfs_noNLP <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                             function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_noNLP,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_dfs_noNLP |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_dfs_event, 
                          dfs_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event, 
                         test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_dfs_noNLP  <- rsf_res_dfs_noNLP  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_dfs_noNLP  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_DFS_noNLP_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_dfs_noNLP  <- summary_dfs_noNLP  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "DFS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_dfs_noNLP 

write_tsv(final_dfs_noNLP,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_dfs_nogenomic <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                                  function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_nogenomic,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_dfs_nogenomic |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_dfs_event, 
                          dfs_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event, 
                         test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_dfs_nogenomic  <- rsf_res_dfs_nogenomic  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_dfs_nogenomic  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no genomic") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_DFS_nogenomic_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_dfs_nogenomic  <- summary_dfs_nogenomic  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "DFS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_dfs_nogenomic 

write_tsv(final_dfs_nogenomic,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rsf_res_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- map_dfr(tree_grid,
                                     function(trees) {

    fold_c <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
                      ~ {
                        
        data <- data_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
          select(- c(patient_id,
                     sample_id))
                        
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]

        fit <- rfsrc(Surv(years_to_dfs_event, 
                          dfs_status) ~ .,
                     data = train_data,
                     ntree = trees,
                     splitrule = rule)

        pred <- predict(fit, 
                        newdata = test_data)
        
        risk <- -pred$predicted

        concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event, 
                         test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
      }
    )

    tibble(trees = trees,
           c_fold_1 = fold_c[1],
           c_fold_2 = fold_c[2],
           c_fold_3 = fold_c[3],
           c_fold_4 = fold_c[4],
           c_fold_5 = fold_c[5])
  }
)

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic  <- rsf_res_dfs_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -trees,
               names_to = "fold",
               values_to = "c_index") |> 
  group_by(trees) |> 
  summarise(mean_c_index = mean(c_index),
            sd_c_index = sd(c_index),
            lower_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(c_index, 0.975),
            .groups = "drop") 

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = trees, 
                       y = mean_c_index)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_95, 
                  ymax = upper_95),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of trees",
    y = "C-index (95% CI)",
    title = "Random survival forest model (DFS)",
    subtitle = "Feature sets included: no NLP or genomic") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(paste0("../results/07_tree_plot_DFS_noNLPgenomic_",
              rule,
              ".png"))

final_dfs_noNLPgenomic  <- summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic  |> 
  filter(trees == max(trees)) |> 
  mutate(model = "RSF",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "DFS",
         rule = rule) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, rule))

final_dfs_noNLPgenomic 

write_tsv(final_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
          file = "../results/07_rsf_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```
